claims.summary: Semantic trickle and recovery hold can remain present after their original context.
claims.disposition: Verified semantic persistence, stagnation, trickle, and freshness evidence.

claims.summary: Pressure source and porosity should be separable from semantic persistence.
claims.disposition: Verified typed pressure-source and resonance-density components.

claims.summary: Bias and dispersal conditions should be compared against the current recovery lane.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded offline telemetry/replay comparison.

claims.summary: Localized pressure-aware relief could reduce persistent semantic load.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because relief changes live semantic admission and runtime regulation.
